name: @ironforge/workflow-trigger-deploy
description: Workflow task Lambda — trigger-deploy. Populates 3 GitHub Actions repo secrets (deploy role ARN, S3 bucket name, CloudFront distribution ID) on the user's repo via libsodium-wrappers sealed-box encryption, then fires workflow_dispatch on deploy.yml with the jobId as correlation_id. wait-for-deploy (PR-C.8) downstream identifies the dispatched run by run-name match.
